title: Axion Basinschein: A search for gravitationally bound solar axions via stimulated decay into photons
description: M.Sc. thesis completed at McGill University under Prof. Katelin Schutz. Received a grade of 1.1 (Very Good).

title: Color Superconductivity in Dense Quark Matter
description: Final project for a Graduate Statistical Mechanics course. Explores the CFL phase, QCD phase diagram, and how color superconductivity manifests in compact stars.

title: Black Holes, Singularity Theorems and The Global Structure of Spacetime
description: B.Sc. thesis at Leipzig University. Topics: causal structure, Penrose-Hawking singularity theorems, and global spacetime geometry.

title: Dark Matter as Long-Lived Particles (LLPs)
description: Graduate seminar presentation for Dark Matter Theory course at Heidelberg University. Covered phase-space suppression, small coupling parameters, LLP signatures at the LHC.

title: Causal Structure of Spacetime
description: Graduate seminar presentation for QFT and Gravity course at Leipzig University. Topics: causal and chronological relations, globally hyperbolic spacetimes, Cauchy surfaces.
